chip_recommendation: DO NOT PLAY TC. GW38 is a standard single gameweek with no double gameweek confirmed. TC requires a player to play twice in the same GW to double their points — that condition does not exist this week. Activating TC would double points on a single appearance, providing minimal gain over normal captaincy. With no future GWs remaining, the chip is forfeit at season end regardless; but playing it in a non-DGW is strictly worse than holding it unused. Leave TC unplayed.

Named captain per APEX protocol. Available and nailed. Solid floor for the final week.

sell_candidates.note: UNAVAILABLE and benched — contributes 0 points. Would be the prime sell candidate in any normal GW but GW38 is the final gameweek. No transfer benefit exists. No action required.

DOUBTFUL — rotation risk for the final XI. Munoz (bench, DEF, AVAILABLE) provides auto-sub cover if Gabriel misses. No transfer action needed at GW38 — taking a hit for one game in the final week is not justified.

summary: GW38 is the final gameweek of 2025/26. No price movement is active (season end confirmed, 0 rises and 0 falls in price.json). No transfers are recommended — bank is 0.3m and no future gameweeks exist. TC chip must NOT be played: GW38 is a single gameweek with no DGW, so TC adds no meaningful benefit over normal captaincy. Key risk is Gabriel (DOUBTFUL, slot 2 starter) — Munoz on bench provides DEF auto-sub cover if needed. Captaincy decision: Bowen is the APEX cum_pts protocol pick but M.Salah at 13.4m carries higher ceiling. Manager should confirm lineups before deadline and consider switching armband to Salah if fixture and team news support it.
